query:
SELECT 
  ir.questionId,
  SUBSTRING(ir.response, 1, 80) as response_preview,
  ir.createdAt,
  ir.updatedAt
FROM intakeResponses ir
WHERE ir.organizationId = (SELECT id FROM organizations WHERE slug = 'rmca')
ORDER BY ir.questionId
LIMIT 50;
command:

  ir.createdAt,
  ir.updatedAt
FROM intakeResponses ir

ORDER BY ir.questionId
LIMIT 50;
